mapper.select: /* com.matjzing.mapper.FrontExcalendarMapper.selectFrontExcalendarList */ SELECT CALENDAR_SEQ /**/ , USER_SEQ /**/ , GOOGLE_CAL_ID /**/ , ACCESS_TOKEN /**/ , REFRESH_TOKEN /**/ , USE_YN /**/ , REGISTER_SEQ /**/ , REGISTER_IP /**/ , REGISTRATION_DT /**/ , UPDATER_SEQ /**/ , UPDATER_IP /**/ , UPDATE_DT /**/ FROM EXCALENDAR

/* com.matjzing.mapper.FrontExcalendarMapper.selectFrontExcalendarPage */ SELECT CALENDAR_SEQ /**/ , USER_SEQ /**/ , GOOGLE_CAL_ID /**/ , ACCESS_TOKEN /**/ , REFRESH_TOKEN /**/ , USE_YN /**/ , REGISTER_SEQ /**/ , REGISTER_IP /**/ , REGISTRATION_DT /**/ , UPDATER_SEQ /**/ , UPDATER_IP /**/ , UPDATE_DT /**/ FROM EXCALENDAR

/* com.matjzing.mapper.FrontExcalendarMapper.selectFrontExcalendar */ SELECT CALENDAR_SEQ /**/ , USER_SEQ /**/ , GOOGLE_CAL_ID /**/ , ACCESS_TOKEN /**/ , REFRESH_TOKEN /**/ , USE_YN /**/ , REGISTER_SEQ /**/ , REGISTER_IP /**/ , REGISTRATION_DT /**/ , UPDATER_SEQ /**/ , UPDATER_IP /**/ , UPDATE_DT /**/ FROM EXCALENDAR WHERE CALENDAR_SEQ = #{calendarSeq}
mapper.update: /* com.matjzing.mapper.FrontExcalendarMapper.updateFrontExcalendar */ UPDATE EXCALENDAR SET UPDATER_SEQ = #{updaterSeq} /*수정자_시퀀스*/ , UPDATER_IP = #{updaterIp} /*수정자_아이피*/ , UPDATE_DT = NOW(3) /*수정_일시*/ , USER_SEQ = #{userSeq} /**/ , GOOGLE_CAL_ID = #{googleCalId} /**/ , ACCESS_TOKEN = #{accessToken} /**/ , REFRESH_TOKEN = #{refreshToken} /**/ WHERE CALENDAR_SEQ = #{calendarSeq}

/* com.matjzing.mapper.FrontExcalendarMapper.deleteFrontExcalendar */ UPDATE EXCALENDAR SET UPDATER_SEQ = #{updaterSeq} /*수정자_시퀀스*/ , UPDATER_IP = #{updaterIp} /*수정자_아이피*/ , UPDATE_DT = NOW(3) /*수정_일시*/ , USE_YN = FALSE WHERE CALENDAR_SEQ = #{calendarSeq}
